SELECT t.text, regexp_extract_all(t.text, '([a-zA-Z0-9]+)(\d*)', 2) AS numbers FROM test_strings AS t WHERE t.text LIKE '%test%';
SELECT t1.text AS original_text, r.extractions FROM test_strings AS t1 JOIN (SELECT text, regexp_extract_all(text, '([a-z]+)(\d*)', 1) AS extractions FROM test_strings) AS r ON t1.text = r.text;
SELECT DISTINCT regexp_extract_all(CONCAT(t1.text, ' ', t2.text), '([a-zA-Z0-9]+)_?', 1) FROM test_strings AS t1 JOIN test_strings AS t2 ON t1.text <> t2.text;
CREATE TABLE mixed_data (id INT, description STRING);
SELECT id, regexp_extract_all(description, '([a-z0-9]+)_(\w+)', 2) AS results FROM mixed_data WHERE id > 1;
WITH extracted AS (SELECT text, regexp_extract_all(text, '([a-zA-Z]+)_?', 1) AS match_groups FROM test_strings) SELECT COUNT(*) FROM extracted WHERE match_groups IS NOT NULL;
